En: A golden sun melts down your throat, its rays filling your nostrils with sunshine. Your stomach melts from it -- into a happy gooey mess! So does your mind, all the bad things are melting. You're you again. A *real* cop. A real detective. *Incredibly* well done.
Zh: 你的喉咙中融化了一轮金色的太阳，甜美的阳光充溢着你的鼻腔。太阳的温融化了你的肠胃——把那里变成了一团快活的黏浆！你的意识也随之融化，一切不悦都在酒中消融。你再度找回了自我。成为了*真正的*警察。名副其实的警探。这口酒真是*绝了*。

En: Look at the bottle.
Zh: 观察瓶子。

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Oh, no, you don't -- not this one. That's not *you*. You...
Zh: 哦，别这样，你不能——不能再这么拒绝下去了。这一点也*不像你*。你……

En: Wow, the gods of mass production have made this alcohol container *laughably* easy to open. A child could have done it.
Zh: 嚯，司掌大规模生产的诸神令这种酒瓶的开启方式简单得*可笑*。就连小孩都能做到。

En: I don't know about this...
Zh: 我不太确定……

En: Fine. We're not worried... you'll crawl back to this bottle soon enough. We'll give you another chance. Booze *always* gives you *another* chance.
Zh: 随便。我们并不担心……你很快就会爬回这个酒瓶边上的。到时候我们会再给你一次机会。酒*总是*会给你*另一次*机会。

En: Yes, it's *merciful* that way. It's your friend. Come back to it, we're all rooting for you to.
Zh: 很好，这样就够*仁慈*了。它是你的朋友。回到它身边吧，我们都支持你。

En: Not *all* of us...
Zh: 不是*所有人*都意见一致……

En: What will be the repercussions if I take that sip?
Zh: 如果我抿一小口，会造成怎样的不良影响？

En: Take a sip.
Zh: 抿一小口。

En: You see a flash of teeth -- a young woman smiling at you, near some railway overpass in your ruined past. She is gorgeous. And she is *yours*.
Zh: 有人在对你露齿而笑——那是一位笑容满面的年轻女性，站在某座铁路立交桥附近，背景是你沉沦的过去。她是如此的美丽动人。而且她还是*你的人*。

En: Nothing. Some *mental* stuff. Nothing to be worried about. Physically you'll be strong as an ox!
Zh: 无所谓。不过是*精神上*的琐事罢了。完全不值得担心。你的肉体会变得强壮如牛！

En: In the bottom right corner of the screen there's an ALCOHOL button! ALCOHOL gives +1 to PHYSIQUE skills: Physical Instrument, Half Light, Electrochemistry, Endurance, Pain Threshold, and Shivers. This is good before rolling a White Check -- but damages your Morale. And remember...
Zh: 在屏幕右下角，你可以看到有一个喝酒的按钮！喝酒可以给予你所有体格技能+1加成，包括：强身健体、疑神疑鬼、钢筋铁骨、食髓知味、坚忍不拔以及强身健体。在进行白色检定前吸烟会很好用。不过，喝酒是有伤士气的。

En: From the void we came. And to the void we must return!
Zh: 虚无乃吾等之源头。亦为吾等之归宿！

En: You've passed up your chance to start drinking ALCOHOL for now, but don't worry! The option to start drinking becomes available again in 2 hours.
Zh: 你刚刚错过了开始喝酒的机会。不过别担心，开始喝酒的选项会在2小时候再次开启。

En: No. No. I'm not doing it. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 不，不行，我不能这么做。[忽略思维。]

En: Open the bottle.
Zh: 把瓶子打开。

En: No. No. I'm not doing it. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 不，不行，我不能这么做。[忽略思维。]

En: There's a satisfying pop as the cap comes off, and the hair on your back rises like an army at attention. You've been here before. Welcome back, detective. You're home now...
Zh: 打开的瓶盖发出了令人心满意足的砰声，背上的寒毛如同士兵立正一般竖起。你体验过这样的感觉。欢迎回来，警探。你到家了……

En: Should I though? I may have a teeny-weeny heart attack problem.
Zh: 我真应该这样做吗？说不定我有点轻微的心脏病呢。

En: Oh, yes. The chest pain and the dizziness. You've *suffered* long enough -- now it's time to drink, to live.
Zh: 哦，当然啦。胸痛外加晕眩。你已经*饱受折磨*太久——现在该好好喝上一杯，享受生活了。

En: Why is it always about *you*? *Your* heart problem? *Your* coronary artery? Think about *us*. We're in this together. You and your wacky tie of substance abuse! Do it for *us*! Pop it open.
Zh: 为什么总是*你*怎么样？*你的*心脏问题？*你的*冠状动脉？想想*我们*吧。我们是一根绳上的蚂蚱。你和你那滥用药物的古怪领带！为*我们*而干杯吧！开瓶大吉。

En: Fine. We're not worried... you'll crawl back to this bottle soon enough. We'll give you another chance. Booze *always* gives you *another* chance.
Zh: 随便。我们并不担心……你很快就会爬回这个酒瓶边上的。到时候我们会再给你一次机会。酒*总是*会给你*另一次*机会。

En: A golden sun melts down your throat, its rays filling your nostrils with sunshine. Your stomach melts from it -- into a happy gooey mess! So does your mind, all the bad things are melting. You're you again. A *real* cop. A real detective. *Incredibly* well done.
Zh: 你的喉咙中融化了一轮金色的太阳，甜美的阳光充溢着你的鼻腔。太阳的温融化了你的肠胃——把那里变成了一团快活的黏浆！你的意识也随之融化，一切不悦都在酒中消融。你再度找回了自我。成为了*真正的*警察。名副其实的警探。这口酒真是*绝了*。

En: The light reflects off this bottle of sweet, sweet liquor -- a gift from above. The gods have been generous. Pop it open before they change their minds...
Zh: 这瓶甘醇无比的酒反射着光芒万丈——可谓天赐之礼。诸神对你真是慷慨无比。最好在它们改变主意之前打开酒瓶……

En: There's a satisfying pop as the cork jumps out, and the hair on your back rises like an army at attention. You've been here before. Welcome back, detective. You're home now...
Zh: 弹出的软木塞发出了令人心满意足的砰声，背上的寒毛如同士兵立正一般竖起。你体验过这样的感觉。欢迎回来，警探。你到家了……

En: There's a satisfying crack as the cap comes off, and the hair on your back rises like an army at attention. You've been here before. Welcome back, detective. You're home now...
Zh: 打开的瓶盖发出了令人心满意足的咔嚓声，背上的寒毛如同士兵立正一般竖起。你体验过这样的感觉。欢迎回来，警探。你到家了……

En: There's a satisfying pop as the cap comes off, and the hair on your back rises like an army at attention. You've been here before. Welcome back, detective. You're home now...
Zh: 打开的瓶盖发出了令人心满意足的砰声，背上的寒毛如同士兵立正一般竖起。你体验过这样的感觉。欢迎回来，警探。你到家了……

En: Well, hello. Someone seems to have found himself a bottle of *alcohol*. Here's where the *magic* happens.
Zh: 哎呀，真棒。某人这是找到了一瓶*酒*嘛。*魔力*就在瓶中酝酿。

En: Light reflects off the green glass of the Commodore Red. The gods have been generous. Better pop it open before they change their minds...
Zh: 红色海军准将的绿色玻璃瓶反射着光芒万丈。诸神真是对你无比慷慨。最好在它们改变主意之前打开酒瓶……

En: Light reflects off the thermal cup. The borscht may not look like much, but doubtless it'll get the job done. Better pop it open before it gets cold...
Zh: 保温杯反射着耀眼的光芒。这种罗宋汤虽然看起来并不像酒，但肯定能满足你的酒瘾。最好在凉掉之前打开保温杯……

En: Pale-aged vodka? This is rare game indeed. The gods have been generous. Better pop it open before they change their minds...
Zh: 在灰域中陈化的伏特加？这可真是罕见的做法。诸神对你慷慨无比。最好在它们改变主意之前打开酒瓶……

En: What a *solid* can of mass-produced piss water. Well over 10% alcohol in this so-called *beer*. Pop it open before it gets too warm...
Zh: 一瓶大规模生产的尿液，装得*满满当当*。这瓶所谓的*啤酒*的酒精含量远远超过了10%。最好在变温之前开瓶大吉……

En: You did it. You fucked up now. No money, no way to pay Garte. There's only one option left...
Zh: 干得好。你彻底搞砸了。没钱也没办法付清加尔特的账。你只剩一个选项了……

En: What is it?
Zh: 什么选项？

En: Go... to the trash container...
Zh: 走吧……去垃圾箱……

En: His glasses turn golden as the fire reflects off the lenses. Once again, you are filled with the certainty: this man is your brother.
Zh: 你眼中的火焰将他的眼镜镜片染成金色。你再一次发自真心地确认：他就是你的兄弟。

En: You suck a minuscule drop of extremely chemical-smelling liquid into your mouth. There it seeps into your tongue. When you swallow it's already almost all gone.
Zh: 面对这种味道刺鼻的化学药剂，你只敢稍微吸入一滴。那液体瞬间就渗入了你的舌头，几乎没残留什么可供吞咽的东西。

En: You suck a manly dose of the extremely chemical-smelling liquid into your mouth. There it seeps into your tongue. When you swallow it's already almost all gone.
Zh: 面对这种味道刺鼻的化学药剂，你一口吞下了对得起男子气概的量。那液体瞬间就渗入了你的舌头，几乎没残留什么可供吞咽的东西。

En: Whoa! In your hand: *pyrholidon* -- the double rainbow of synthetic hallucinogens. Rare and gritty, a product of the age of atomic power.
Zh: 嚯嚯！你手中握着的是：*吡嚯浣酮*——合成迷幻药界的双重彩虹。可谓凤毛麟角，醍醐灌顶，毕竟是原子能时代的产物。

En: Look at the little puck of liquid.
Zh: 观察这团液体。

En: Atomic power? Too scary. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 原子能？太吓人了。[忽略思维。]

En: What a funny little cap! Don't let the *scary* medical warnings throw you off. It's an inadequate antidote to radiation poisoning, but a *potent* antidote to *boredom*.
Zh: 多有趣的小药盒啊！你可别被那个*可怕的*药物警告吓跑了。这东西不适合做辐射中毒的解药，却是能治愈*无聊*的*特效*药。

En: It's not gonna *give* you radiation poisoning, stupid. Pyrholidon is a perfect match for a bad-ass junkie cop who's looking for a little *heat*.
Zh: 这玩意不会*导致*辐射中毒，蠢货。吡嚯浣酮绝对适合你这种嗑药成瘾，又想找点*热情*的牛逼警察。

En: Wait -- radiation poisoning sounds scary.
Zh: 等一下——辐射中毒听起来很吓人啊。

En: You need to lower the radiation levels, your stomach thinks. Slurp it.
Zh: 你需要降低辐射水平，你的肠胃这么认为。来一口吧。

En: No problem. This one's for the brave and sensitive ones anyway. It could improve your human interactions. But -- you threw that chance away. No matter, in a few hours you'll get the urge again. Maybe then you'll choose more courageously?
Zh: 随你的便吧。反正这玩意只适合勇敢机敏之人。它可以提升你的人际交往能力。可惜——你抛弃了这个机遇。不要紧，再过几个小时，你还会产生同一种欲望的。也许到时候你会做出更有种的选择？

En: That's really not what I'm looking for. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 我真不需要这种东西。[抛弃这个想法。]

En: Hmm... open the cap.
Zh: 嗯……打开药盒。

En: The container is warm to the touch -- or is that just the anticipation? You screw the lid open and look. A little slit on the side lets you just *slurp* it up, like an oyster! C'mon! Slurp it!
Zh: 容器摸起来是温暖的——也许只是你期望如此？你拧开盒盖，看了看里面。药盒边上有条小缝让你可以*啜*上一口，就像牡蛎一样！来嘛！啜一口！

En: Slurp it *aggressively*.
Zh: *用力*啜上一口。

En: Slurp it, but only a little.
Zh: 啜一口，只稍微啜一小口。

En: I'm not going to slurp it. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 我才不啜呢。[抛弃这个想法。]

En: Wait, won't Kim see me slurp it?
Zh: 等等，金会看见我啜这个的吧？

En: What is he, your mother? Is Kim your *au pair*? Slurp it, slurp the morsel of danger-joy!
Zh: 他算什么，你娘亲吗？金是你的*互惠生*吗？快啜吧，啜一口这危险的快感！

En: You suck a manly dose of the extremely chemical-smelling liquid into your mouth. There it seeps into your tongue. When you swallow it's already almost all gone.
Zh: 面对这种味道刺鼻的化学药剂，你一口吞下了对得起男子气概的量。那液体瞬间就渗入了你的舌头，几乎没残留什么可供吞咽的东西。

En: You suck a minuscule drop of extremely chemical-smelling liquid into your mouth. There it seeps into your tongue. When you swallow it's already almost all gone.
Zh: 面对这种味道刺鼻的化学药剂，你只敢稍微吸入一滴。那液体瞬间就渗入了你的舌头，几乎没残留什么可供吞咽的东西。

En: Tastes like fire.
Zh: 尝起来像是火焰的味道。

En: Tastes like gasoline.
Zh: 尝起来像汽油的味道。

En: Tastes like... an anti-radiation drug.
Zh: 尝起来像是……抗辐射药物的味道。

En: It tastes like *many* things, all melting into one conflagration in the back of your throat. As you look around, the world slowly *exists*. As it did before. Only now gentle flames lick at its edges, as though it were a photo burning.
Zh: 它尝起来像*很多种*东西，全部融为一团烈火，烧灼着你的咽喉。你望向四周，发现整个世界正缓缓*浮现*。一如既往。只是多了一片温柔的火焰，舔抵着它的边缘，如同一张燃烧的相片。

En: Tastes like a kiss.
Zh: 尝起来像是亲嘴的味道。

En: Really?
Zh: 真的吗？

En: No. Of course not really. It's just a metaphor. The effect of that otherworldly drop of liquid is slower, more subtle than that of real flames -- yet just as warm.
Zh: 不。当然不是真的。这只是个隐喻。这种超凡脱俗的液体的药效远比现实中的火焰更缓慢，更微妙——但两者同样温暖。

En: Oh god, on *fire*?
Zh: 我的天，是*着火*了吗？

En: Not *really*. It's just a metaphor. The effect of that otherworldly drop of liquid is slower, more subtle than that of real flames -- yet just as warm.
Zh: 不是*真正的*火焰。只是个隐喻而已。这种超凡脱俗的液体的药效远比现实中的火焰更缓慢，更微妙——但两者同样温暖。

En: This warmth. It makes you want to share your *discovery* with Kim!
Zh: 这种温暖。让你迫不及待地想和金分享你的*发现*！

En: No. I can't see it.
Zh: 不。我没看见火焰。

En: Of course, it's just a metaphor. It's just a metaphor. The effect of that otherworldly drop of liquid is slower, more subtle than that of real flames -- yet just as warm.
Zh: 你当然看不见，因为那只是个隐喻。这种超凡脱俗的液体的药效远比现实中的火焰更缓慢，更微妙——但两者同样温暖。

En: Kim, I just did a drop of that anti-radiation drug. It's great.
Zh: “金，我刚尝了一滴抗辐射药。感觉很棒。”

En: This is going to be *so* useful in my line of work. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 肯定会对我的工作*很有帮助*。[完成思维。]

En: Will I be able to stand straight and walk?
Zh: 我还能直立行走吗？

En: I'm happy for you, he answers.
Zh: “我为你感到高兴。”他回应道。

En: His glasses turn golden as the fire reflects off the lenses. You feel this man is your brother.
Zh: 你眼中的火焰将他的眼镜镜片染成金色。你感觉他就是你的兄弟。

En: Just don't *mix* it with anything, he thinks, looking you over. Thankfully his sense of balance seems okay. Whatever. I'm not getting involved.
Zh: 只要别*混合*吸食别的东西就行。他这样想着，观察着你的状态。好在他的平衡感没出什么问题。无所谓了。我不打算干预。

En: Wow, Kim's bad ass. *Or* he's had a druggie partner? Whoa. That's probably it! He's seen it before.
Zh: 嚯，金一直都这么讲义气吗。*还是说*他以前有过瘾君子搭档？哇，可能就是这么回事！他早就见识过了。

En: Look at all these guys go off like fireworks as information pours into you -- about the lieutenant's simple remark: *I'm happy for you*. This stuff is great.
Zh: 瞧瞧这些家伙，一个接一个地像烟花一样绽放，将各种信息倾入你的脑海——仅仅是因为警督简单地回应了一句：*我为你感到高兴*。这玩意就是这么美妙。

En: Why not? This government-developed substance seems very non-intrusive. You could even operate heavy machinery! Fire-machinery!
Zh: 为什么会有那种问题呢？这种政府开发的药物没什么侵入性。你就算是去操作重型机械和消防机械也不会有问题的！

En: Please don't actually operate any fire-machines.
Zh: 请不要真的去操作任何消防机械。

En: Already you can tell you're going to be slurping a *lot* more pyrholidon! This stuff is going to give you insight into that little flickering light hidden in all human beings.
Zh: 你确信自己今后还会摄入*更多*吡嚯浣酮！这玩意能让你洞悉人性中微弱的闪光。

En: If you can keep the vomit in. Because it sort of also makes you want to throw up.
Zh: 只要你能忍住别吐出来就行。因为这玩意会让你想吐。

En: In the bottom right corner of the screen there's a PYRHOLIDON button! It gives +1 to PSYCHE skills: Empathy, Suggestion, Authority, Inland Empire, Esprit de Corps, and Volition. This is good before rolling a White Check -- but damages your Health.
Zh: 在屏幕右下角，你可以看到有一个吡嚯浣酮按钮！吡嚯浣酮可以给予你所有精神技能+1加成，包括：通情达理、循循善诱、争强好胜、同舟共济、平心定气以及内陆帝国。在进行白色检定前吸烟会很好用。不过，使用吡嚯浣酮是有害健康的。

En: You've passed up your chance to start using PYRHOLIDON for now, but don't worry! The option to use it becomes available again in 4 hours.
Zh: 你刚刚错过了开始使用吡嚯浣酮的机会。不过别担心，开始使用吡嚯浣酮的选项会在4小时候再次开启。

En: Get a load of this rock and roll cop here, people! Johnny Thundercop fishes a cheap lighter out of his pants. With a flick of the thumb there's fire, a primal satisfaction. Here we go...
Zh: 摇滚警察大驾光临，瞧一瞧看一看呐，乡亲们！霹雳特警强尼从裤兜中掏出了打火机。弹指之间，火苗窜起，顶级的满足感。扑面而来……

En: Thick, warm smoke gets sucked down into your lungs. Immediately you feel a warm nostalgia fill your head, body *and* soul. A nostalgia for *yourself*, the man you were in your youth. Johnny Thundercop is back. And he's chill as balls.
Zh: 随着浓郁，温和的烟雾吸入肺部，一股温柔的怀念*立刻*充溢你的脑海，身躯*以及*灵魂。这是你所怀念的*自己*，年轻时的你。霹雳特警强尼*强势回归*。而且他简直酷炫到爆了。

En: Pull one out of the pack.
Zh: 抽出一支烟。

En: I'm not going to do it. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 我不会这么做的。[忽略思维。]

En: Shut up. It's already happening...
Zh: 闭嘴吧。生米正在煮成熟饭呢……

En: What are the repercussions if I do this?
Zh: 如果我吸了，会有怎样的不良影响？

En: Dip that bad boy in the flame and breathe in.
Zh: 快让这坏家伙欲火焚身，然后猛吸一口。

En: No. Throw it away at the last second. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 不行。在即将吸入之际毅然扔掉这支烟。[忽略这个想法。]

En: Repercussions? There's a high risk of GLORY? With a mild chance COOL *GENIUS*. Smoking makes you into an INTELLECTUAL, everybody knows that.
Zh: 不良影响？比如获得“荣耀”的风险很高？还有一定几率成为酷炫的*天才*。众所周知，吸烟会让你成为“知识分子”。

En: Thick, warm smoke gets sucked down into your lungs. Immediately you feel a warm nostalgia fill your head, body *and* soul. A nostalgia for *yourself*, the man you were in your youth. Johnny Thundercop is back. And he's chill as balls.
Zh: 随着浓郁，温和的烟雾吸入肺部，一股温柔的怀念*立刻*充溢你的脑海，身躯*以及*灵魂。这是你所怀念的*自己*，年轻时的你。霹雳特警强尼*强势回归*。而且他简直酷炫到爆了。

En: In the bottom right corner of the screen there's a CIGARETTES button! CIGARETTES give +1 to INTELLECT skills: Logic, Rhetoric, Conceptualization, Visual Calculus, Encyclopedia, and Drama. This is good before a White Check -- but damages your Health.
Zh: 在屏幕右下角，你可以看到有一个香烟按钮！香烟可以给予你所有智力技能+1加成，包括：逻辑思维、能说会道、标新立异、见微知著、博学多闻以及故弄玄虚。在进行白色检定前吸烟会很好用。不过，吸烟是有害健康的。

En: It *will* help you concentrate a bit, that much is true.
Zh: 吸烟稍微有助于集中集中注意力，这可是货真价实的。

En: It only lets you concentrate because you're in *nicotine withdrawal*. It only mitigates it's own...
Zh: 那之所以有助于集中注意力，是因为导致你注意力涣散的正是*尼古丁戒断症状*。吸烟只是在缓解它自己造成的问题罢了……

En: You've passed up your chance to start smoking CIGARETTES for now, but don't worry! The option to start smoking becomes available again in 3 hours.
Zh: 你刚刚错过了开始吸烟的机会。不过别担心，开始抽烟的选项会在3小时候再次开启。

En: You picked the best one! This soldier is fat and succulent. What are you waiting for? Light up -- re-become yourself!
Zh: 你选中了最出色的战士！这位尼古丁的士兵是多么的肥美多汁。你还等什么？点烟吧——重返自我！

En: Oh yes, *bratan*! (The tie is shaking around your neck excitedly.) Please light up. You *need* a trooper between your lips right now! Calm your shit down. Go to Pleasureland. Become a *genius*!
Zh: 是啊，*哥们儿*！（领带绕在你的脖子上，兴奋地颤抖着。）请务必点上这支烟。你*迫切需要*在嘴边叼上一位天降尼古丁的神兵！安抚一下你的瘾头。前往极乐世界。成为*天才*吧！

En: I don't wanna light it right *now*, people are watching.
Zh: 我不想*现在就*点烟，还有人看着呢。

En: People are watching. What a pussy! People are *always* watching -- that's what makes it *cool*, now come on!
Zh: 有人看着？你这懦夫！人们*一直*在看着——所以这样才*酷*呢，别废话了！

En: Shut up and light that shit! You wanna be an idiot for the rest of your life? This shit will give you the cool edge you need.
Zh: 闭嘴点烟！你想浑浑噩噩地度过余生吗？这玩意会给你急需的酷炫派头。

En: There it is, a brave little army in your pocket. The First Smokes Platoon. Twenty brave souls standing in salute, ready to step into the fire for you, sir...
Zh: 就在这里，你的口袋里装着一支勇敢的小小军队。人称第一吸烟排。二十位勇敢的士兵向你立正敬礼，时刻准备为你赴汤蹈火，指挥官……

En: Light it up!
Zh: 点烟！

En: Get a load of this rock and roll cop here, people! Johnny Thundercop fishes a cheap lighter out of his pants. With a flick of the thumb there's fire, a primal satisfaction. Here we go...
Zh: 摇滚警察大驾光临，瞧一瞧看一看呐，乡亲们！霹雳特警强尼从裤兜中掏出了打火机。弹指之间，火苗窜起，顶级的满足感。扑面而来……

En: I already had a heart attack. Maybe smokes are harmful?
Zh: 我已经犯过心脏病了。也许吸烟有害健康？

En: Put it back in the pack. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 把烟塞回烟盒里。[忽略这个想法。]

En: The lighter's dark green, disposable plastic. Safety's off -- in your case, the safety is *always* off.
Zh: 打火机是廉价的一次性塑料做的。安全锁已经解除了——对你而言，安全锁*一直*形同虚设。

En: No, what's *harmful* is fretting and worrying. It's the *stress* that's wearing your ticker down. The smokes will soothe it. They're medicinal.
Zh: 不，真正*有害健康*的是烦恼和担忧。*压力*才是导致你心脏停跳的罪魁祸首。吸烟只会减轻你的压力。这是一剂良药。

En: Step into the light and be reborn in the cleansing flame, *bratan*!
Zh: 踏入光芒，在净化之火中重生吧，*哥们儿*！

En: Will they *always* be looking, though? Because they might go to the toilet or you might be in a different...
Zh: 不过，人们真的会*一直*看着吗？毕竟人们可能会去厕所，或者你也可能会在不同的……

En: Hey, you can't smoke in here. The girl's voice betrays little interest or enthusiasm. She doesn't even look up when as she continues: "Please don't fuck with Frittte."
Zh: “嘿，这里不许抽烟。”女孩的声音不带丝毫兴趣或热情。她讲话的时候甚至都没有抬头看你一眼：“请不要在弗莱特胡闹。”

En: The man in the stinking tracksuit nods solemnly. "Having a well-deserved break from your adventures. It's what we all need sometimes."
Zh: 穿着恶臭运动服的男人一本正经地点了点头。“这是冒险途中应得的休息。我们都需要这种放松。”

En: ...bla bla bla. Boring. Light it up!
Zh: ……唠唠叨叨，啰啰嗦嗦。真无聊。点烟吧！

En: Already you regret it -- looking at the pack... But don't worry. You can come back to this later. The army of smokes is honourable and faithful to you. You have your entire *life* to return to it.
Zh: 你已经感到后悔了——仅仅是因为看着这包烟……但别担心。你可以稍后再来。香烟军队对你忠心耿耿。你还有整整*一辈子*可以随时返回阅兵式的主席台。

En: You raise the Preptide bottle, press one nostril closed, and inhale *furiously* with the other. The rush is almost immediate. It tastes bitter and caustic, and stings a bit inside your nose.
Zh: 你举起备潮的瓶子，按住一边的鼻孔，用另一边的*猛*吸一口。药劲儿几乎瞬间涌上心头。那是一股苦涩，如同烧碱般的味道，令你的鼻腔感到阵阵刺痛。

En: You raise the bottle, close a nostril and inhale *furiously*. The rush is almost immediate. It tastes bitter and caustic, and stings a bit inside your nose.
Zh: 你举起瓶子，按住一边的鼻孔，接着*猛*吸一口。药劲儿几乎瞬间涌上心头。那是一股苦涩，如同烧碱般的味道，令你的鼻腔感到阵阵刺痛。

En: Will it make me into a Supercop?
Zh: 这能让我变成超能警察吗？

En: It will make you into *more* than that -- a Megacop! This is your modus operandi. This is how you've done it for *years*. Let's go!
Zh: 它能让你变得比那个*更牛逼*——极霸警察！这就是你的办案手法。你已经这么干了*很多年*了。出发吧！

En: Hngfff...

Hmmm, you could work with this high... Like, literally *work*: Solve the case, file some papers. Maybe clean up your hostel room, then solve *another* case, then start a side investigation into the para-natural, then build a radiocomputer...
Zh: 嗯，你可以边嗨边干……我是说，干你的*本职工作*：破案，整理一些文件。也许还能收拾一下你的旅馆房间，接着去破*另一个*案子，顺便调查一下超自然现象，然后亲手造出一台无线电电脑……

En: Whooh, this shit is strong. This shit is disco.
Zh: 噢噢，这玩意儿真他妈够劲儿。真他妈迪斯科。

En: Kim, I did a little speed. I hope you don't mind. It was for professional reasons.
Zh: “金，我刚吸了点思必得。希望你不要介意。我这么做都是出于职业原因。”

En: Feels great. Are there *any* downsides to this at all?
Zh: 感觉棒极了。这玩意真的有*什么*负面影响吗？

En: Cool, cool, let's boogie. [Finish thought and spring to action.]
Zh: 很好，很好，华丽起舞吧。[结束这个想法并立刻开始行动]

En: I'm not your mother. He avoids your gaze. "I don't care. Do what you have to do."
Zh: “我不是你妈。”他避开了你的视线。“我不在乎。你觉得有必要就做吧。”

En: As long as you remain functional, he thinks. Now let's get back to work.
Zh: 只要你还能正常工作就行，他是这么想的。好了，该回去工作了。

En: To *this*? You kidding?! There are downsides to *not* being on it.
Zh: *这玩意*？你在开玩笑吗？！*不*吸这玩意才有负面影响呢。

En: There are *massive* downsides. It's a potent neurotoxin. You're turning yourself into a frayed idiot.
Zh: 负面影响*极为严重*。这是一种烈性神经毒素。你正在把自己变成脑子烧坏的白痴。

En: Time for a little truth. Tell the lieutenant you did some, clear the air.
Zh: 实话实说吧。告诉警督你吸过了。澄清事实。

En: Spring-spring! Everything is clear around you. You're ready to concentrate on the next task in the task chain.
Zh: 精神焕发！周围的一切都变得清晰无比。你已经全身心准备就绪，随时可以专注于任务链上的下一步。

En: In the bottom right corner of the screen there's a SPEED button! SPEED gives +1 to MOTORIC skills: Perception, Reaction Speed, Hand/Eye Coordination, Savoir Faire, Interfacing, and Composure. This is good before a White Check -- but damages your Morale.
Zh: 屏幕右下角有一个思必得按钮！只要按一下就能获得所有身手类技能+1：五感发达，反应速度，眼明手巧，鬼祟玲珑，能工巧匠，从容自若。这一加成在面对白色检定时非常实用——但是会挫伤你的士气。

En: You've passed up your chance to start using SPEED for now, but don't worry! The option to use it becomes available again in 1 hour.
Zh: 你刚刚错过了开始喝酒的机会。不过别担心，开始喝酒的选项会在2小时候再次开启。

En: Now that you've acquired some stimulants, it's time for a little pick-me-up. Time to *detect*.
Zh: 既然你已经搞到了兴奋剂，就赶紧给自己提神醒脑吧。*探案*的时间到啦。

En: Wait, but Kim is here. He'll be dissappointed.
Zh: 等等，但金还在场呢。他会失望的。

En: What... but right *here*? Now?
Zh: 什么……*原地*提神？立刻醒脑？

En: Okay, my body is ready. Let's do this. (Try some speed.)
Zh: 很好，我已经饥渴难耐了。来吧。（来点思必得。）

En: This is gonna be really bad for my health, isn't it?
Zh: 这玩意对我的健康非常不好，对吧？

En: See, that's your problem -- a lack of confidence. Speed can help you with that *and* Kim. It can help you with EVERYTHING.
Zh: 你瞧，这就是你的问题所在——缺乏自信。思必得能能帮你解决这个*以及*金的问题。思必得能帮你解决一切问题。

En: See, that's your problem -- a lack of confidence. Speed can help you with that. It can help you with EVERYTHING.
Zh: 你瞧，这就是你的问题所在——缺乏自信。思必得能帮你解决这个问题。思必得能帮你解决一切问题。

En: I'm not doing this now. [Ignore thought.]
Zh: 我现在可不想这么做。[忽略思维。]

En: It's not ideal, no... But you need the zeal. Let's face it, you're never going to finish this case without cheating.
Zh: 确实，这不是最理想的时间和地点……但你迫切需要那股激情。面对现实吧，如果不作弊的话，你是永远解决不了这个案子的。

En: You raise the bottle, close a nostril and inhale *furiously*. The rush is almost immediate. It tastes bitter and caustic, and stings a bit inside your nose.
Zh: 你举起瓶子，按住一边的鼻孔，接着*猛*吸一口。药劲儿几乎瞬间涌上心头。那是一股苦涩，如同烧碱般的味道，令你的鼻腔感到阵阵刺痛。

En: Mamma mia!
Zh: 妈妈咪呀！

En: Good to have you back, Officer Megacop. The world has been waiting.
Zh: 谢天谢地，您总算是回来了。极霸警官。全世界都在恭候您呢。

En: Good to have you back, Officer Supercop. The world has been waiting.
Zh: 谢天谢地，您总算是回来了，超能警官。全世界都在恭候您呢。

En: Now the taste is slowly receding into your throat... The rush is growing in intensity, your little heart pounding like a bird in a cage. A sweat breaks out across your brow, your jaw clenches...
Zh: 那股味道正缓缓从喉咙中褪去……而药劲儿正在逐渐变强，你可怜的心脏正像笼中的鸟儿一样雀跃不已。额头大汗淋漓。牙关紧闭……

En: And, let's be honest, there's a little chest pain -- the *good* kind, of course. You may wanna blast a Nosaphed or something.
Zh: 还有。咱们实话实说吧，你的胸口有点痛——当然啦，是*有益*的那种。不过你可能需要来点诺沙菲德之类的东西。

En: This is so unprofessional of you. Think you can ignore this -- your *moral compass* telling you to sniff it? Guess again -- you'll be back here soon. You'll get the chance to choose more wisely.
Zh: 你这样可就太不专业了。你自认为可以无视这样的现实——驱使你吸一口的正是你的*道德准则*。这可能吗——你很快就会绕回同一个问题的。到时候你会做出更明智的选择。

En: You raise the Preptide bottle, press one nostril closed, and inhale *furiously* with the other. The rush is almost immediate. It tastes bitter and caustic, and stings a bit inside your nose.
Zh: 你举起备潮的瓶子，按住一边的鼻孔，用另一边的*猛*吸一口。药劲儿几乎瞬间涌上心头。那是一股苦涩，如同烧碱般的味道，令你的鼻腔感到阵阵刺痛。
